feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: replicating S/4 VDM models in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

Given that there is a vast array of CDS views and Queries withing SAP S/4 VDM, is it necessary to recreate similar models in Datasphere?  It sounds like a duplication of effort.  What do you all think?  What would be the best practice in this regard?  As you know, SAP SAC provides live connection to S/4 for reporting utilizing the vast array of built-in CDS Analytical Queries.   There must be a blog on this subject, but I cannot find it.  Let me know if you know of any blogs on this subject.

Thanks

Abdul

entry.title: notes 3144435 not support S4CORE 108
entry.content:
--- Product/Function ---

No predicted product

User selected product: SAP S/4HANA (Recommended & Recent)

No predicted product function

User selected product function: SAP S/4HANA > Master Data > Material/Product Data Management (Recent)

Predicted component: LO-MD-MM (Product Function)

 

--- TagID/AreaID ---

TagID:

AreaID:

entry.title: How can we have one inspection lot generated for multiple batches during GR for a PO?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts. I need your support and feedbacks to get to a solution to meet my clients requirement. 

As per standard SAP, for every batch created during Goods Receipt there is an Inspection lot created but our requirement is for multiple batches created during GR, we want only one Inspection lot to be created.

Is it possible to meet this requirement in standard SAP only with configurations or settings or an enhancement is a must?

Kindly share your thoughts and expert advise.

Note: We do not have EWM and have ruled out any settings related to this. Batch is created manually and have external batch numbering

Regards,

Lenin

entry.title: Block Planning tab has no details for characteristics in PDS view screen | S4 Hana | CURTO_SIMU |
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a query regarding Block Planning with PDS. I have setup a block planning scenario in my system and the blocks are correctly picking the relevant characteristics orders as per the block basis definition maintained, however, when I am checking the PDS with /n/SAPAPO/CURTO_SIMU transaction, I can see that even though the 'Block Planning Class' assignment is shown correctly, the 'Block Planning' tab for the activity is empty and having no values for characteristics. I want to know am I missing any config. or any master data setup is missing here? Please see the attached screenshot for reference.

Appreciate your response in advance.

entry.title: UD Reversal Note - IM and EWM SLOC
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need to carryout UD reversal in certain scenarios for stocks taken in IM and EWM locations. Now we are struggling a lot in case of trying to reverse the Material Documents. 

We are in SAP S4 2020 (On Premise).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SD/EWM Real Open Quantities in Sales Schedule Agreement / Schedule Lines
entry.content:
Hi SAP Masters,

I am a recent SAP S4HANA Public Cloud User with EWM and found out that in SAP universe, when there is an Outbound Delivery created, this reduces our Open Quantity as if this was already shipped, but since it is only created and we are waiting for the truck to arrive, it is a bit misleading to say that the quantity is already delivered, could anyone share any suggestion on how to tackle this simple problem?

We would like to know all real open quantities, not 1 by 1 check.

To be able to check also our real backlog with our customers

entry.title: What is a Pacemaker Work center in capacity scheduling table/board?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I've been trying to understand how to use the capacity scheduling board and the capacity scheduling table apps in Fiori but I facing an issue. When I click the work center filter on the top, I find it empty whereas there are plenty of work centers in the system. So after doing some research and skimming through this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/did-you-know-this-about-capacity-planning-in-s-4hana/ba-p/13579456 , I've come across the word "Pacemaker work center" but I can't find a clear definition for what exactly is it and what differentiates it from a regular work center. It seems that these apps only show a Pacemaker work center.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP GUI 8.0 PATCH 9 HOTFIX 1
entry.content:
Dear all

I would like to download last patch form SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS 8.0 , PATCH 9, HOTFIX 1, but just the patch, to update our server and update all Clients customers.

Can you help me to find this update? Not all SAP GUI packet

 

thanks in advance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Badi MD_EXT_SUP is not triggered in MD01n - MRP Live
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to update the issuing storage location while transferring the stock between two internal storage locations. Right now in the purchase requisition the issue storage location is shown as blank.

Even after maintaining the special procurement type  config BADI is not triggering. Can you let me know if there is any option to update the issuing storage location in MD01 ?

Regards,

Manoj

entry.title: BP Validation based on Business Partner, vendor, tax number
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Kindly Guide me how to put validation IN Tax number, Such that each vendor has only one tax number,

There is no duplicate Tax Number for each vendor.  I have to check if vendor has one tax number in region.
I have used BADI'S like BUPA_IDENT_CHECK, But it is not hitting when I debug it.

If there is any particular process for this requirement. Please guide me. Inputs are highly appreciated.

entry.title: Authorizations ME51N - I want to disable Save Action
entry.content:
in my role i have transactions ME51N/ME52N/ME53N.

I want to disable on users to make Save - Create PR , but i want to have access to Hold / Park the PR 

How to disable the Save Button Activity ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: PPDS on SAP GUI for Java known issues
entry.content:
Hy guys,

I am currently using a Mac M3 with sap gui for Java 7.8. At the moment I am trying to learn PPDS and have noticed i can’t open CDPS0 on gui because it can’t execute „Control“ because its only supported for windows. Are there any other known issues regarding PPDS and sap GUI for Java?

 

I already asked our IT but they won’t support installing a windows VM and doing it by myself would be against company regulations. Has anyone found a workaround to this issue? I really would like to keep the Mac, but if it’s not possible i guess I have to ask for a windows notebook again. Using the fioris is not an option because I have been told/ shown that it doesn’t have the same functions as in GUI.

 

Thanks

entry.title: To add an additional field for "Supplier" in Find Maintenance Order and Operation App (F2173)
entry.content:
This app does have a filter "Supplier" in it which refer to the Vendor field in the external data tab, but it does not consider the "Supplier" field which is maintained for the Operation in Services Tab (When the enhanced procurement is set ON), where one operation can have more than one supplier assigned to it.

To achieve the filtering based on the supplier assigned to operations in Services Tab, I want to have an additional field added in this app. From a technical perspective is this a complex task or a simple task where we need to just map OData services to the newly added field.

The end goal is to have a work pack created based on suppliers grouping. And the first step to that is to have display the suppliers assigned to an operation.

entry.title: S/4 HANA trial on GCP with 90-day, $300 Free Trial offer
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

is it possible to use the S/4 HANA 30-day free trial in combination with the 90-day, $300 Free trial offer on GCP? While setting up the system, I received the following error: 

 
Usage limits reached: Regional: - Quota 'SSD_TOTAL_GB' exceeded. Available: 500, Requested: 964 To solve this problem you have to request any additional quota from the Quotas page in the GCP console.
More Information
GCP Documentation
 
Additional Quota on the other hand cannot be acquired with the 90-day, $300 Free Trial offer:
 

 

 
Has anyone found a way to use both trials (S/4 HANA and GCP) combined and if so how?

entry.title: Regarding Best Practices Client
entry.content:
As I understand to implement the next best practices in the system we do not have to make any customizing/configuration changes in already activated BPs.

Please confirm if our functional teams are good to create transactional data in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Maintenance Plans - several skipped in one day and one PM got generated
entry.content:
there is an issue for some Maintenance Plans that so many calls have been skipped and only one PM got generated. screenshots for table MHIO, t-codes IP24 and IP10, shown below; can anyone explains what happened?

 

table MHIP

t-code: IP24

t-code: IP10

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

@S0022314014

entry.title: Odata service that returns data to the online store
entry.content:
Hello,
I would like to create an Odata service that retrieves data for a customer in SAP.
I'm fairly new to this topic and don't know my way around yet.
The data should then be displayed in our online store.

The customer number and email of the customer are also transferred from the online store in the URL so that the corresponding customer can be found.

Do you have any ideas on how exactly I can implement this?

I would also like to know how the parameters from the URL can be used in the SQL query.

Thank you very much!

entry.title: To add an additional value in the selection list in the Work Pack Grouping attribute.
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to add a new field as attribute in the grouping criteria for the work pack.

There is already a list of 50 attributes (fields) from maintenance order, and I want to add another field as an attribute to this list, for SUPPLIER for the operation form services tab, when enhanced procurement mode is set ON; and NOT the SUPPLIER field which is present in the external data tab.

How can I do this?

entry.title: Credit Exposure in Sales Contract
entry.content:
How the credit exposure impact in Sales Contract, will it consume all the credit on the basis of Contract value or periodically it will consume the credit and update the exposure?

 

Please share the config information.

entry.title: Deatils of PR Items not displaying in My Inbox application of Fiori.
entry.content:
The details of PR Items not displaying in My Inbox application of Fiori after upgrading to S/4 HANA 2023.

Maintained the visualization parameters as mentioned in the sap note 3289039.

Item details started to appear after that, but administrative data started to disappear, which used to appear earlier.

I need both administrative data and Item details on the work item in My Inbox application.

Any suggestions or input is much appreciated.
